introSection: Eurofigther is a steel roller coaster located at Zoosafari Fasanolandia in Fasano, Apulia, Italy. It is the first roller coaster from German firm Gerstlauer to be installed in Italy. The attraction was announced in 2006 as a new addition for 2007, however construction was delayed. The ride officially opened four years later in 2011.
fullText: Eurofigther is a steel roller coaster located at Zoosafari Fasanolandia in Fasano, Apulia, Italy. It is the first roller coaster from German firm Gerstlauer to be installed in Italy. The attraction was announced in 2006 as a new addition for 2007, however construction was delayed. The ride officially opened four years later in 2011.
